    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    N

    name - Variable in class Controllers.InformationController
     
    name - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    name - Variable in class Entities.Manager
     
    name - Variable in class Entities.Subscriber
     
    name - Variable in class Entities.Supervisor
    Full name of the supervisor.
    name - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The full name of the user.
    NameColumn - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberInformationController
     
    NOT_SHOWED - Enum constant in enum class enums.ReservationStatus
    The customer did not show up for the reservation.
    noteColumn - Variable in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
     
    NOTIFIED - Enum constant in enum class enums.WaitingStatus
     
    numberOfDiners - Variable in class Controllers.GuestMakeReservationController
     
    numberOfDiners - Variable in class Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
     
    numberOfDiners - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberReservationController
     
    numberOfDiners - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
    Text field for entering the number of diners.
    numberOfDinersField - Variable in class Controllers.BaseReservationController
     
    numOfGuests - Variable in class Entities.Reservation
     
    numOfGuests - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Number of guests in this reservation.
    numOfGuests - Variable in class messages.AddToWaitingListRequest
    Number of guests in this request.
    numOfGuests - Variable in class messages.UpdateReservationRequest
    The updated number of guests for the reservation.
